message:

@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-30976-undefined-symbol-ruby-abi-version-regression-with-xcode-13-14",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: Undefined symbol `_ruby_abi_version` regression with Xcode 13 -> 14",
+    "description": "Undefined symbol `_ruby_abi_version` regression with Xcode 13 -> 14. This issue affects 30+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nLook for error: `linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?\ngrpc: 1.48.0\nlanguage: ruby 2.7.6\n\n### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?\nMacOS 12.6\nApple M1 chip\n\n### What runtime / compiler are you using (e.g."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Undefined symbol `_ruby_abi_version` regression with Xcode…",
+        "description": "The next Ruby version, 3.2, will have builtin ABI checking (see ruby/ruby#5474). This requires that the symbol `ruby_abi_version` is present in the shared object, otherwise the object fails to load.\n\nFor example, this is a small repro in Ruby 3.2:\n\n```\n$ ruby -Isrc/ruby/lib -e \"require\n```yaml\nUndefined symbols for architecture arm64:\n  \"_ruby_abi_version\", referenced from:\n     -exported_symbol[s_list] command line option\nld: symbol(s) not found for architecture arm64\nclang: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)\nmake: *** [grpc_c.bundle] Error 1\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade grpc to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade grpc:\nUpdate the grpc dependency in your project manifest to the latest version.\nSee the project's releases: https://github.com/grpc/grpc/releases"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Undefined symbol `_ruby_abi_version` regression… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that `linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The next Ruby version, 3.2, will have builtin ABI checking (see ruby/ruby#5474). This requires that the symbol `ruby_abi_version` is present in the shared object, otherwise the object fails to load.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Undefined symbols for architecture arm64:\n  \"_ruby_abi_version\", referenced from:\n     -exported_symbol[s_list] command line option\nld: symbol(s) not found for architecture arm64\nclang: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)\nmake: *** [grpc_c.bundle] Error 1",
+        "$ ruby -Isrc/ruby/lib -e \"require 'grpc'\"\n<internal:/home/peter/src/ruby/install/lib/ruby/3.2.0+0/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb>:85:in `require': /home/peter/src/grpc/src/ruby/lib/grpc/grpc_c.so: undefined symbol: ruby_abi_version - ruby_abi_version (LoadError)\n\tfrom <internal:/home/peter/src/ruby/install/lib/ruby/3.2.0+0/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb>:85:in `require'\n\tfrom /home/peter/src/grpc/src/ruby/lib/grpc/grpc.rb:22:in `<top (required)>'\n\tfrom /home/peter/src/grpc/src/ruby/lib/grpc.rb:19:in `require_relative'\n\tfrom /home/peter/src/grpc/src/ruby/lib/grpc.rb:19:in `<top (required)>'\n\tfrom <internal:/home/peter/src/ruby/install/lib/ruby/3.2.0+0/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb>:85:in `require'\n\tfrom <internal:/home/peter/src/ruby/install/lib/ruby/3.2.0+0/rubygems/core_ex",
+        "export DLDFLAGS=-Wl,-undefined,dynamic_lookup\n# however you are installing... gem directly\ngem install grpc\n# or ...\nbundle install"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "grpc",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "grpc"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc/issues/30976",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/grpc/grpc/pull/28976"
+    },
+    "reactions": 30,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "protoc"
+    ],
+    "description": "gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)"
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:41:51.377Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
